summary: Conservative plan for live PR inventory shard 63: all 40 hydrated refs are open pull requests with security_sensitive=false. The job has no canonical, says to classify each PR independently, blocks merge/fix/raise_pr, and does not enable low-signal closeout; no mutating close/merge/fix actions are planned.
